### Props

| Name               | Type            | Required | Default                                                         | Description                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     |
| ------------------ | --------------- | -------- | --------------------------------------------------------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ------ | --------------------------------------------------------- |
| `title`            | `string`        |          | `() =&gt; t('nextcloud-vue', 'Files')`                          | Page title.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     |
| `description`      | `string`        |          | `''`                                                            | Description shown under the title when `showTitle` is set.                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
| `showTitle`        | `boolean`       |          | `false`                                                         | Whether to render the inline page header.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
| `icon`             | `string`        |          | `''`                                                            | MDI icon name for the header.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   |
| `folder`           | `string`        | ✓        | —                                                               | Folder path within the user's Nextcloud filesystem. Required for the "Open in Files" link to work; the spec marks this field required at the manifest level.                                                                                                                    |
| `allowedTypes`     | `string[]`      |          | `[]`                                                            | MIME types to filter on. Each entry is matched literally OR as a wildcard with a trailing `/*`. Examples: `['application/pdf']` keeps only PDFs; `['image/*']` keeps every image MIME.                                                                                          |
| `files`            | `Array<object>` |          | `[]`                                                            | Pre-loaded file listing — used when the consumer wants to provide their own data fetch (e.g. via the consuming app's existing FilesPlugin). Each entry: `{ name, path, size, mtime, mime }`. When empty, the component falls back to the `#files-view` slot or the empty-state. |
| `loading`          | `boolean`       |          | `false`                                                         | Whether a fetch is in progress (rendered as a spinner).                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |
| `error`            | `Error          | string   | object`                                                         |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 | `null` | Error object/message — when truthy the error state shows. |
| `emptyText`        | `string`        |          | `() =&gt; t('nextcloud-vue', 'No files in this folder')`        | Empty-state text.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               |
| `errorText`        | `string`        |          | `() =&gt; t('nextcloud-vue', 'Could not load folder contents')` | Error-state text.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               |
| `openInFilesLabel` | `string`        |          | `() =&gt; t('nextcloud-vue', 'Open in Files')`                  | Label for the "Open in Files" button.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
| `onRefresh`        | `union`         |          | `null`                                                          | Optional refresh callback wired to the slot scope. The library cannot trigger a re-fetch on its own (no built-in WebDAV client), so consumers pass their own re-fetch function in.                                                                                              |

### Slots

| Name         | Bindings                                                          | Description |
| ------------ | ----------------------------------------------------------------- | ----------- |
| `header`     | `title`, `description`, `icon`                                    |             |
| `actions`    | —                                                                 |             |
| `files-view` | `folder`, `allowed-types`, `files`, `loading`, `error`, `refresh` |             |
| `error`      | `error`                                                           |             |
| `empty`      | —                                                                 |             |

### Methods

| Name      | Description                                                                  |
| --------- | ---------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `refresh` | Programmatic refresh — calls the consumer-supplied `onRefresh` when present. |
